title: RAG Product FAQ
scenario: Create a list of frequently asked questions (FAQs) for the Rugged Adventure Gear (RAG) waterproof backpack. The FAQs should include questions about the product's features, benefits, and usage, as well as any other relevant information. The output should be in a markdown format and include at least 10 FAQs.

evaluationCriteria.description: The FAQs are well-written and relevant.
The FAQs are organized into clear sections.
The FAQs meet the word count and point requirements.
